HEATSINK_BUFF.title: Heatsink
HEATSINK_BUFF.description: Whenever you play a Power card, draw the corresponding number of cards.
HEATSINK_BUFF.smartDescription: Whenever you play a Power card, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] cards.
ELECTRODYNAMICS_BUFF.title: Electrodynamics
BERSERK_BUFF.title: Berserk
BERSERK_BUFF.description: At the start of your turn, gain the corresponding amount of Energy.
BERSERK_BUFF.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, gain {Amount:energyIcons()}.
SELF_REPAIR_BUFF.title: Self Repair
SELF_REPAIR_BUFF.description: At the end of combat, heal the corresponding amount of HP.
SELF_REPAIR_BUFF.smartDescription: At the end of combat, heal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
